rationale_overall: All eight current positions retain intact thesis support as of June 30, 2025. NVDA printed Q1 FY26 revenue of $44.1B (up 69% YoY, reported May 28), confirming the AI-infrastructure wave is mid-surge despite the $4.5B H20 China export charge. MSFT's Q3 FY25 showed Azure up 33% with 16 percentage-points attributable to AI services, making it one of the clearest enterprise-AI-adoption signals of the quarter. GOOGL Q1 2025 net income rose 46% on AI-driven Cloud and Search demand. NUKZ benefits from the April 15 nuclear-utility breakout — hyperscaler PPAs with nuclear utilities are now a confirmed structural shift, not a rumor. ITA is supported by the EU ReArm Europe program and NATO spending up 20% YoY, the strongest defense-spending cycle in a decade. RKLB received a KeyBanc Overweight upgrade (price target $135) on June 14, offsetting the Neutron-delay class-action lawsuits filed in April; Electron continues a 10-launch consecutive-success streak. IONQ Q1 revenue of $7.6M is small in absolute terms but the company guided Q2 to $16-18M and raised full-year guidance to $75-95M; the May 21 CHIPS Act $2B quantum-funding announcement is a structural tailwind that aligns with holding IONQ through the early-buildup phase the profile targets. BOTZ covers the robotics wave with established liquidity; the newly launched KOID humanoid robotics ETF (listed June 4-5, 2025) is the most compelling new entrant but has only ~18 trading days of price history, insufficient for the mean-variance optimizer to characterize. The two waves absent from the watchlist — demographics/healthcare and LNG energy — both lack Q2 2025 catalysts strong enough to justify displacing a working position at the watchlist cap; healthcare lagged broad markets and LNG spot rates were depressed with approximately 60 carriers idle. The tariff shock of April 2 ('Liberation Day') created sharp volatility but the 90-day implementation pause, combined with thesis-confirming earnings across the AI, nuclear, and defense buckets, leaves the watchlist well-positioned for Q3 2025.
